name: Creamy Mushroom Soup (Atlas)
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Shiitake mushrooms, fresh or other
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of margarine in a soup pot.
2. Add onions and sauté over moderate heat until golden.
3. Add the next five ingredients (potatoes, celery, garlic, bouillon cubes, and water) and bring to a boil.
4. Stir in seasonings, white wine, and mustard; cover and simmer over moderate heat for 15 minutes.
5. Stir in half of the sliced white mushrooms and simmer an additional 10 minutes.
6. Remove soup from heat and let stand for a few minutes.
7. In a separate skillet, wipe out the pot, then heat remaining margarine.
8. Sauté the shiitake mushrooms (without stems) and any other mushrooms over moderate heat until tender; set aside.
9. Add beans to the soup and puree in batches using an immersion blender or food processor.
10. Return the puréed mixture back to the soup pot and stir in the sautéed mushrooms.
11. Grind pepper into the soup just before serving.
12. Before serving, simmer the soup for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
13. Adjust consistency if needed by adding more water or broth.
14. Sprinkle each serving with minced parsley.
Nava Atlas, "Vegetarian Celebrations"
